_spec.purpose: Variety-engine ledger. The directors room MUST read this before choosing a visual system and MUST append after delivery. Divergence rules (hard constraints): hero_structure must differ from the last 4 entries; atmosphere from the last 3; continuity_device from the last 2; hook_archetype from the last 3; palette_family from the last 3; type_pairing from the last 2. Novel techniques not in the library are encouraged - name them NEW:<name> and add them to TECHNIQUE_LIBRARY.md.

entry_schema.hero_structure: technique name/number driving the deck's signature look
entry_schema.hook_archetype: e.g. big-number, named-tension, question-map, before-after, quote
entry_schema.palette_family: e.g. arctic-teal, amber-sodium, roe-orange, ice-mint, violet-dusk
entry_schema.type_pairing: display + support families and axes used
entry_schema.narrative_structure: e.g. escalation, tour, argument, timeline, anatomy, versus

entries.hero_structure: Alaska Hero Map (cartographic; camera-state changes across the deck: whole-state -> North Slope zoom -> ground-level 3D -> 4-node abstraction -> Railbelt -> whole-state bookend)
entries.depth_technique: Multiplane Parallax, low-horizon North Slope tundra with cabinet-oblique gravel pad + volumetric gas-flare shafts (slide 4)
entries.continuity_device: camera (recurring map changing state) + motif:constellation-corner (Polaris + mono counter + coords)
entries.palette_family: arctic-teal + flare-amber (semantic: snow=public, amber=industry/gas, aurora-green=AI/compute, gold=decision/open-door)
entries.type_pairing: Fraunces display + Manrope support + JetBrains Mono instrument
entries.narrative_structure: escalation-then-widen (argument: four rooms, one open door)

entries.hero_structure: Evolving mark-of-one-fish glyph ledger (hand tally-stroke vs machine bounding box on a spawning sockeye) plus software-3D dawn riverbank (counting tower + lone drone-in-a-box); NOT a cartographic camera map
entries.atmosphere: Tannin river fog / cold field morning (Mesh Wash body + one warm Conic Horizon dawn beat on S8)
entries.depth_technique: Multiplane Parallax + depth-weighted wireframe tower on S5 (low horizon HZ~886, DOF-blurred foreground reeds repoussoir, colored fog); parallel/flat data elsewhere
entries.line_voice: instrument/editorial + transit/systems (detection boxes, constellation edges) + hand-ink (tally strokes)
entries.continuity_device: timeline-spine (1955->2026 year-ruler, advancing red marker) + motif:mark-of-one-fish (hand-stroke -> bounding-box -> both) + edge-tease
entries.palette_family: tannin-slate + driftwood-ink + drone-grey + sockeye-red accent (gold #FFC72C fixture only)
entries.type_pairing: Archivo variable (wdth+wght axes; display expanded + body normal) + JetBrains Mono instrument
entries.narrative_structure: audit / versus (two methods scored honestly), escalation to a debate close
new_techniques_logged: SpawningSockeye (side-profile spawning sockeye SVG icon: humped dorsal, kype, olive-green head, forked tail; body doubles as the data anchor)

entries.hero_structure: Evolving seismic-trace conductor motif (one phosphor trace born from an AK3D ember-lit volcano cover, splitting/flatlining/folding into a spectrogram, bending into InSAR fringe rings, forking to 5 observatory nodes, resolving to a steady baseline) + instrument-panel diagram slides; NOT a map-camera deck, NOT a glyph-ledger deck
entries.atmosphere: Obsidian instrument night + volcanic ember (cover only) + CRT/phosphor instrument register; no aurora, no mesh wash, no fog wash
entries.continuity_device: motif-evolution + edge-tease (the conductor trace) + aviation-color palette arc (green/yellow/orange -> instrument cyan -> gold/green calm) + fixed top-right mono alert-readout strip doubling as progress counter
entries.hook_archetype: present-tense reveal (three volcanoes awake right now; a machine is listening)
entries.palette_family: obsidian + ember orange #FF6A1E + sulfur yellow #E8C23A + phosphor green #35D6A6 + InSAR cyan-to-magenta #5AC8F0->#C64FD0 (gold #FFC72C fixture only)
entries.type_pairing: Space Grotesk display + JetBrains Mono instrument + Instrument Serif italic accent (cover dek + close eyebrow only)
techniques_used: #34 AK3D Terrain (cover volcano, camera math computed)
entries.notes: First instrument-register deck. The evolving-trace conductor is the strongest continuity device so far per flow-critic; connective tissue on S3/S6/S7 added after flow review.

entries.hero_structure: Subsurface engineering cutaway 'The Cook Inlet Gas Machine' (cabinet-extruded folded-strata section) on a PANORAMA SPINE (continuous strata as f(globalX); camera pans reservoir -> pipeline+valve -> AI tower across S2-S8; cover/close are pulled-back whole-slab bookends). NOT a cartographic-camera map, NOT a glyph-ledger, NOT a trace-conductor instrument panel
entries.atmosphere: Core-Sample Haze (desaturated subsurface fog #0B1622 + warm sodium surface glow + faint gas-blue reservoir luminance); no aurora/mesh, no tannin fog, no obsidian-instrument-ember-phosphor
entries.depth_technique: Cabinet Extrusion (#39) strata slab + cabinet-oblique 3D bars (S8, parallel projection) + gradient-solid shaded valve + multiplane atmospheric fade to basement; honest parallel projection on all quantities
entries.line_voice: instrument/editorial (dimension calls, leaders, haloed balloon numbers, drafting furniture) + material cross-hatch coding (shale dense / sandstone sparse / gas stipple)
entries.continuity_device: panorama-spine (primary) + valve-state motif (open S1-5 -> shut S6-9 with an amber lock-bar) + reservoir-lens state machine (empty -> depleted -> filling -> phantom) + palette-arc (gas-cyan/sodium supply half -> cool trough at the shut valve -> slate/gold demand)
entries.palette_family: Depleted Reservoir: earth ochre #B0803A + shale slate #2B3C49 + sandstone #6E5F4A + methane gas-blue #5AC8F0 + sodium lamplight #F3A24C + flag gold #FFC72C
entries.type_pairing: Fraunces display + Manrope body + JetBrains Mono instrument
entries.narrative_structure: anatomy/argument: teach the machine, show the valve shut, measure the new load, ask
new_techniques_logged: Subsurface Cutaway Panorama (NEW): continuous cabinet-extruded folded-strata cross-section as a panorama-spine chassis, with a per-slide reservoir-lens state machine and a valve open/shut motif; the ground line doubles as the demand skyline
entries.notes: Scored 8.90 vs 8.3. Weakest = artwork craft (7): flat strata bands + plain lenses + S1/S9 lower-third dead zones (strata-texture helper parked for Phase 12). Story-art fusion 9 (gauge fill = 'half', 17 sheets = 17pp, tower 1.3x, valve open/shut = the ruling).

entries.hero_structure: Closing Autonomy Ring: a 4-arc cyclic control-system loop (detect/decide/dispatch/douse) that fills one arc per stage as a fixed corner progress mark (with an explicit N/4 fraction) and seals shut with a gold Polaris at the verdict; full-size as the S5 loop schematic and the S8 sealed ring. Paired with a single-actor deep-field rendered machine (S6). NOT a cartographic camera-map, glyph-ledger, trace-conductor instrument panel, or subsurface cutaway panorama.
entries.atmosphere: Cold spruce-tinted arctic night (green-tinted #08130E/#0F2A20, deliberately not run-3 obsidian, not run-4 ochre) with a small warm fire antagonist; a low warm burn-scar beat at the stakes; a fire-lit dusk at the rendered machine; ice pre-dawn at the verdict/close.
entries.depth_technique: akthree GPU PBR rendered hero (S6): backlit quadcopter silhouette + warm fire key + cool aurora fill + warm rim, exp2 fog, atmospheric spruce ridgelines, DOF, smoke shafts; designed AK3D multiplane fallback. Neon-layered ring emblem; big-number and honest parallel bars elsewhere.
entries.line_voice: Cased cyan signal lines with directional arrowheads and junction dots (transit/systems); drafting furniture (scale box, corner ticks, north arrow) on the arena slide; five-token weight discipline.
entries.continuity_device: motif-evolution (the closing Autonomy Ring as a discrete cyclic STATE machine + explicit N/4 counter, sealing gold at S8) + palette-arc (cold -> hot burn beat -> fire peak -> ice pre-dawn); plus a shared ember/ignition thread. NOT panorama-spine, NOT a continuous motif-trace with edge-tease.
entries.hook_archetype: engineered emblem / insignia cold-open (the open Autonomy Ring caging an ember on the cover)
entries.palette_family: Spruce-night #02060F/#08130E/#0F2A20 + smoke-dusk #1B3550/#24435F + FIRE antagonist #FF6A2C/#E8531F/#FFB25A (small area) + machine-cue mint #3CE6B4 and ice #5AC8F0 + snow #F4F8FF; gold #FFC72C reserved for Polaris, the ring seal (S8), the counter, and the September marker.
entries.type_pairing: Archivo variable (wght 400-900, wdth 62-125; Expanded Black display, condensed engineered labels, Regular body) + JetBrains Mono instrument. Two families (dodges the two prior forbidden trios and the two-sans crime).
entries.narrative_structure: emblem hook -> arena -> stakes(data) -> five finalists(data) -> the autonomy loop(signature) -> the machine/Dryad claim(rendered breather) -> the purse(data) -> the verdict(synthesis/position) -> close(single ask). Climax on the honest open verdict, not the Dryad demo.
new_techniques_logged: Closing Autonomy Ring (discrete cyclic state-machine motif that doubles as an explicit N/4 progress counter and seals gold at resolution)
entries.notes: Robotics/autonomy story, deliberate break from four consecutive energy/infrastructure/monitoring decks. akthree rendered hero shipped with AK3D fallback. Scored 8.54 vs 8.3; weakest = artwork craft (rendered hero reads slightly flat).

entries.hero_structure: FIRM/SOFT type-weight ledger (a flat editorial balance-sheet on cool drafting film) whose argument lives in TYPE WEIGHT (solid FIRM vs dashed/ghost SOFT), paired with a single rendered LM6000 OBJECT HERO (akthree GPU PBR turbine package: bell intake, casing seams, exhaust stack, skid) as the one depth moment. NOT a cartographic camera-map, glyph-ledger, seismic-trace instrument panel, subsurface cutaway panorama, or ring/emblem.
entries.atmosphere: cool drafting-film night (deep-night #02060F / flag-blue #081426 / panel navy #0E2138) + faint blueprint plus-grid + gas-flame cyan accents; a Deep-Sea-Scrim DOM gradient guards text over the rendered hero. NOT obsidian-instrument/ember-phosphor, NOT core-sample ochre, NOT spruce-night+fire.
entries.depth_technique: akthree GPU PBR rendered turbine (#87) + akpost film grade (#89), objectHero far-side rim, offscreen-composited then drawImage onto the 2D scene; designed AK3D/gradient-solid fallback for webglOK()===false. Cabinet-extrusion type monument on the cover (#39); prism-map proportional copper ticks on the ledger (#32).
entries.line_voice: instrument/editorial (dashed drafting phantom-lines for the SOFT/ghost side; proportional copper ticks on FIRM; scotch-rule + gold spine cap)
entries.continuity_device: motif:the-dividing-rule (FIRM-solid / SOFT-ghost vertical rule that migrates center -> right (cost) -> left (soft) -> centered ledger spine -> SEALS into a gold closed-door at synthesis -> splits open into the close question; doubles as the progress indicator) + palette-arc (cold drafting-blue -> copper at the money/cost beats -> gold peak at the S8 door -> resolves cool)
entries.palette_family: cool-drafting-blue-DOMINANT + copper/amber money-accent + flag-gold decision (deliberately NOT the warm-dominant depleted-reservoir ochre or spruce-fire families)
entries.type_pairing: Bricolage Grotesque (display + short body) + Instrument Serif italic (the SOFT/accent voice) + JetBrains Mono (instrument). NOT Fraunces+Manrope+JBMono, NOT Archivo-variable-only.
entries.narrative_structure: argument (firm-vs-soft asymmetry / who-pays), escalating cost sealed at an executive-session door
new_techniques_logged: FIRM/SOFT dividing-rule motif: type-weight asymmetry (solid vs dashed ghost) AS the argument, the rule migrating per beat and sealing into a gold 'closed door' at synthesis then splitting open into the close question
rendered-object legibility scrim: a Deep-Sea-Scrim DOM gradient behind the text column, layered over a GPU render, guarantees body contrast without moving the hero object off its composition

entries.hero_structure: Waterline cross-section system: a single luminous horizontal waterline at a fixed y=812 on every slide, with a detailed Canvas-2D orthographic semi-submersible ALPV cross-section on S3 (freeboard sliver above; full hull + dashed payload-bay cutaway + ballast hatch + rim light + gold deck edge below). Above the line = visible/Alaska-paper; below = hidden/Oregon-steel. NOT a cartographic camera-map, seismic-trace instrument panel, subsurface cutaway panorama-spine, autonomy-ring emblem, or FIRM/SOFT type-weight ledger.
entries.atmosphere: sonar-dark open-water night: abyssal navy/black water (#02060F/#061423/#0A1E30), a thin luminous waterline (#F4F8FF core plus cyan bloom), cyan-green sonar return arcs from a fixed bottom-right sensor, low slate stealth hull. NOT obsidian-instrument/ember-phosphor, NOT core-sample ochre, NOT spruce-night+fire, NOT cool drafting-film blueprint.
entries.depth_technique: Canvas-2D layered depth (sky gradient + horizon haze + water depth gradient + noise-warped caustics + subsurface radial glow + waterline shadowBlur bloom) and an orthographic cross-section hero with above/below-water tonal split via clip. Deliberate reliability choice in a degraded solo run (no GPU-PBR/raymarch hero, no pixel-critic loop); argued in the storyboard.
entries.line_voice: technical/nautical (dashed freeboard caller, dashed payload-bay cutaway, gold deck edge, cyan rim light, mono contract-ledger rows, dashed gold/slate connector on the geography split)
entries.continuity_device: motif:the-waterline (fixed y=812 across all 8 slides, enter-left/exit-right) plus sonar return rings from a fixed sensor origin; gold Polaris bookends (S1, S8). NOT ring/emblem, NOT type-weight ledger.
entries.hook_archetype: place-paradox two-sentence cover ('The boat is Alaskan. The shipyard is not.'). NOT two-ways-to-count, who-decides/four-rooms, or firm-vs-soft-ledger openers.
entries.palette_family: abyssal-navy + sonar cyan/green (#3CE6B4/#5AC8F0) + waterline white (#F4F8FF) + flag/Alaska gold (#FFC72C). Semantic lock gold=Alaska paper/decision/money, cyan-green=vessel/autonomy/sonar, white=waterline truth, slate=hull/Oregon steel. NOT depleted-reservoir ochre, spruce-fire, or drafting-blueprint families.
entries.type_pairing: Fraunces (essayistic display serif, opsz high) + Space Grotesk (grotesk body) + JetBrains Mono (tabular telemetry/contract rows)
entries.narrative_structure: paradox cover -> the deal (contract card) -> the boat (hero+specs) -> autonomy honestly (aspiration above/reality below) -> the 8(a) mechanism -> paper-vs-steel geography split -> reframe breather -> debatable close

entries.hero_structure: The Uncomputed Ground: a film-graded 2D Alaska relief survey-plate (d3 canonical projection + fbm directional hillshade + topo-contour strokes + bone glow coastline) carrying an UNCOMPUTED prospectivity scan grid (phantom-blue no-data cells) and a scanning reticle; the camera moves over the recurring relief (whole-state cover -> interior -> west single site -> whole-state close). NOT subsurface cutaway panorama, autonomy ring, FIRM/SOFT type-weight ledger, or fixed-waterline cross-section.
entries.atmosphere: graphite-and-bone geological survey: dark arctic graphite base (#050A12/#0B1524), bone/snow coastline glow, phantom-blue uncomputed-grid light, warm gold only where something is real. NOT spruce-night+fire, cool drafting-film blueprint, or sonar-dark navy.
entries.depth_technique: graded 2D relief (fbm directional hillshade + topo-contour strokes clipped to the silhouette + atmospheric vignette + coastline glow), argued flat deliberately (thesis is an unfinished survey; a GPU hero would fight it); honest parallel-projection on all quantities (the money ladder). Scorer capped artwork-craft at 7.5 for reading as a graded 2D map rather than a dimensional plate.
entries.line_voice: instrument/editorial (confidence-meter telemetry, reticle, dimension leaders, dashed phantom-blue milestone ladder, mono labels)
entries.continuity_device: camera-over-recurring-relief + a CONFIDENCE METER motif that evolves and never lies to 100% (PROSPECTIVITY 0% COMPUTED -> MODEL NOT BUILT -> MODEL TBD -> SITES NAMED 1 -> WATCH THE MILESTONES); reinforced by a gold=real / phantom-blue=promise truth-color code and the NN/09 counter. NOT a migrating dividing-rule, NOT a single fixed-y waterline.
entries.hook_archetype: withheld-fact / gap hook (a real win whose centerpiece is missing): overline plus blunt hero 'IT ISN'T BUILT YET'. NOT engineered-emblem cold-open, big-number monument, or place-paradox two-sentence.
entries.palette_family: graphite-night #050A12/#0B1524/#12233A + bone/snow #EDF2FB/#F4F8FF + phantom-blue #6EA5FF (promise/unbuilt/conditional) + flag gold #FFC72C (real/committed/confirmed only). NOT spruce+fire, cool-drafting-blue+copper, or abyssal-navy+sonar-cyan.
entries.type_pairing: Archivo (variable display, width+weight axes) + Manrope (humanist body) + JetBrains Mono (instrument). NOT Bricolage+Instrument Serif+JBMono, NOT Fraunces+Space Grotesk+JBMono.
entries.narrative_structure: argument / honesty-as-edge: hook -> real-but-modest award -> stakes (56/60) -> what the AI would do (illustrative) -> THE TURN (one sentence, model not built) -> money ladder (keepable) -> minerals breather -> one named place -> unresolved close (refuses a false payoff)
new_techniques_logged: Uncomputed Prospectivity Survey-Plate (NEW): a graded 2D Alaska relief map wearing an UNCOMPUTED scan grid (phantom-blue no-data cells) + reticle, paired with a corner CONFIDENCE METER that evolves per beat and never resolves to 100%; the map's refusal to fill in IS the honesty argument. Generalizes to any funded-but-unproven promise-vs-delivery story.

entries.hero_structure: Drone's-eye THERMAL SEARCH-GRID motif over a rendered AK3D delta river-valley: an evolving perspective ground grid (idle -> sweeping+found-dot -> counting 12 -> wide breather -> white-hot LOCKED CNN detection -> forks into AI/human branches -> single sealed node) whose S6 climax is a white-hot aluminum-boat detection with a gold CNN bounding box on rendered thermal terrain. NOT autonomy-ring, FIRM/SOFT type-weight ledger, fixed-y waterline cross-section, or uncomputed-relief survey-plate; NOT a cartographic camera-map, glyph-ledger, trace-panel, or subsurface cutaway-panorama.
entries.atmosphere: THERMAL warm-dominant: ember/amber/white-hot heat signatures on cold navy tundra (deep_night #02060F/#081426/#0E2138 base + rust #B4552A + ember #E8892B + amber #F6B23C + white-hot #FFE9C2), with a warm dusk beat (S5) and a warm dawn beat (S8). NOT cool drafting-film blueprint, sonar-dark abyssal navy, or graphite-and-bone survey.
entries.depth_technique: S6 AK3D software-3D heightfield river-valley thermal-graded via akpost (bright slate valley floor, ember canyon walls, horizon ~0.42) = the rendered-ladder hero; S5 multiplane-parallax dusk aerial delta; S3 d3 conic-equal-area delta map (baseline fitExtent then manual zoom, coastline stroke-only).
entries.line_voice: Instrument/Editorial + Drafting (leaders #72, knockout labels, corner readouts #84, CNN bbox corner-ticks)
entries.continuity_device: motif-evolution (the thermal search grid as an evolving STATE machine that doubles as the progress read) + palette-arc (cold navy -> white-hot peak at S6 -> warm dawn) + Kanektok river edge-tease (warm thread exiting the right edge). NOT fixed-y waterline+sonar rings, NOT camera-over-relief+confidence-meter.
entries.hook_archetype: scene/stakes-declarative cause-and-consequence ('No road out. So Quinhagak learned to fly its own drones.'). NOT big-number monument, place-paradox two-sentence, or withheld-fact/gap.
entries.palette_family: thermal ember/amber/white-hot on cold navy tundra + flag gold #FFC72C. NOT cool-drafting-blue+copper, abyssal-navy+sonar-cyan, or graphite-night+phantom-blue+gold.
entries.type_pairing: Instrument Serif (display, the warm human voice) + Space Grotesk (body/labels) + JetBrains Mono (instrument). NOT Fraunces+Space Grotesk+JBMono, NOT Archivo-variable-only, NOT Archivo+Manrope+JBMono.
entries.narrative_structure: hook -> instant SAR payoff (weekly calls) -> roadless place-proof -> the people (ISOTYPE class) -> origin breather (Nunalleq) -> the machine they own (hero + keepable data) -> honest AI-vs-human subtraction ledger -> own-the-whole-stack sovereignty -> single debate ask.
new_techniques_logged: Thermal Search-Grid motif (evolving drone's-eye perspective ground grid that changes STATE per beat and doubles as progress; climaxes as a white-hot CNN detection cell with a gold bounding box)
AK3D thermal river-valley hero (heightfield + akpost thermal grade, brightened valley floor, raised horizon) as a reliable rendered-ladder landscape hero without GL
Honesty-subtraction ledger (equal MACHINE-AI vs HUMAN-EYES plates that render the AI/human split as the deck's spine, with a standing PILOT/HUMAN tag on the hero)

entries.hero_structure: Isometric WIRING-DIAGRAM built-system: the deck lives in one shared 2:1 dimetric iso world (three-face light, cast shadows down-right) whose focal objects change per beat (junction split -> detached off-grid island -> gold anchor node snapping into the Railbelt web -> gold pivot forking into two arrows -> parchment op-ed data card -> 8-vs-639 ISOTYPE -> AO-solid-stub vs HB-dashed-void). NOT FIRM/SOFT type-weight ledger (6), fixed-y waterline cross-section (7), uncomputed relief survey-plate (8), or thermal search-grid over AK3D valley (9); the iso built-system has never been the series signature.
entries.atmosphere: blueprint-night iso world (deep_night #02060F/#081426/#0E2138 elevation steps) + a live-cyan circuit spine + salmon-risk + one op-ed parchment card. NOT sonar-dark abyssal navy (7), graphite-and-bone survey (8), or thermal ember/amber (9).
entries.depth_technique: software iso 2:1 dimetric (three-face shading top/left/right, cast shadows at 14% down-right), atmospheric fog on the 639 field (S7), gas plume (S3), layered-shadow node elevation (S4/S5), DOF-blurred iso context grid behind the S5 fork, contact-shadowed parchment card (S6). Honest parallel projection on all quantities; flat/iso argued deliberately (a systems wiring diagram).
entries.line_voice: instrument/editorial + transit/systems (neon-triple conduit, junction dots, tapered ribbon arrows, dashed phantom-line #67 for the HB-259 void, drafting readouts/leaders)
entries.continuity_device: shared iso world + motif-evolution (THE CONDUIT changes SHAPE each slide and carries a gold progress tick: cut -> junction split -> severed blunt stub -> live snap into gold node -> forks into two arrows -> green data baseline -> dormant hairline -> solid gold stub vs dashed void -> sealed gold ring) + edge-tease. NOT camera-over-relief+confidence-meter (8), NOT thermal-grid palette-arc+river-tease (9), NOT the No.6 FIRM/SOFT dividing rule.
entries.hook_archetype: direct QUESTION cover ('Will a data center raise your power bill?'). NOT place-paradox (7), withheld-fact/gap (8), or scene/stakes cause-and-consequence (9).
entries.palette_family: blueprint-night + live-cyan conduit (#5AC8F0, restrained accent) + rate-fall green (#3CE6B4) + rate-rise salmon (#EF6A54) + op-ed parchment (#ECE3CE) + flag gold (#FFC72C decision/brand). Semantic lock: gold=decision, cyan=live grid, green=falls, salmon=rises, slate=off-grid, parchment=the advocate's op-ed. NOT abyssal-navy+sonar-cyan (7), graphite+phantom-blue+gold (8), thermal ember/amber (9).
entries.type_pairing: Fraunces (warm display) + Space Grotesk (body/schematic labels) + JetBrains Mono (telemetry). NOT Archivo+Manrope+JBMono (8), NOT Instrument Serif+Space Grotesk+JBMono (9). (Matches No.7's trio, 3 decks back, outside the last-2 constraint.)
entries.narrative_structure: argument / myth-correction: question -> the one distinction -> off-grid correction (the spine) -> the on-grid project that can move bills -> the two-arrow rate-deal fork (hero) -> the attributed 'lower' case (keepable data) -> scale breather -> the false binary + the missing rule (position) -> single debate ask.
new_techniques_logged: Isometric Wiring-Diagram + Evolving Conduit (NEW): a shared 2:1 dimetric iso world whose ONE glowing conduit changes shape every slide (cut/junction/severed/snap/fork/baseline/dormant/solid-vs-dashed/sealed) and carries a gold progress tick + edge-tease; the off-grid subject rendered as a DETACHED slate slab with NO glow makes 'disconnected' legible at thumb with zero words. Generalizes to any on-grid-vs-off-grid, network, or infrastructure-siting argument.
entries.notes: Scored 8.90 vs 8.3. Weakest = artwork craft (7): the S5 fork hero reads as a flat two-arrow schematic (the DOF-blurred context grid barely registers) and S5/S8/S9 carry dead lower zones. Story-art fusion 9 (severed stub=no wire, gold node snap=on-grid, equal arrows=could fall/rise, solid vs dashed=adopted vs in-committee). Deliberate iso/flat chassis chosen to break the chronic flat-hero weakness; partially succeeded (S3/S4 read dimensional; S5 hero still flat).

entries.hero_structure: Arctic-place bookends (orthographic globe, Alaska crowning the top of the world, gold Utqiagvik pinpoint) plus a frost-cyan buried-fiber CABLE spine threading permafrost-ochre ground, with an akthree GPU PBR object still-life of the two buried cables in gravel as the photoreal hero (S4).
entries.atmosphere: polar-night sky over permafrost-ochre ground: cold deep-night/flag-blue sky, a warm ochre and peat ground band where the ground is the subject (S2/S3/S4/S8), cool navy where the method is (S1/S5/S6/S7/S9). NOT graphite-and-bone survey, NOT thermal ember/amber, NOT blueprint-night iso.
entries.depth_technique: akthree GPU PBR still-life (S4, film-graded via akpost, designed Canvas fallback plus snapshot sentinel); d3.geoOrthographic globe with radial limb shading and graticule foreshortening (S1/S9); cabinet-extruded raised cutaways (S2/S5/S6); multiplane vast plain with atmospheric fade (S8).
entries.line_voice: Transit/Systems (loop nodes and arrowheads S7) plus Drafting furniture (spec card S6, dimension call S2) plus Instrument/Editorial (mono readouts throughout).
entries.continuity_device: the frost-cyan cable/signal spine (edge-tease plus motif evolution, changes SHAPE each slide and exits the right edge) plus the place/palette arc with globe bookends (S1/S9) and cold-sky-to-warm-ground colour coding. NOT iso-conduit motif-evolution (10), NOT thermal search-grid state machine (9).
entries.hook_archetype: place-paradox (the most remote ground in America is now the most closely read; the frozen ground now forecasts itself). NOT withheld-fact (8), NOT scene/stakes (9), NOT direct-question (10).
entries.palette_family: polar-night navy (#02060F/#081426/#0E2138) plus ice-cyan signal (#5AC8F0) plus forget-me-not prediction (#6EA5FF) plus permafrost ochre and peat (#B5763C/#6E4A2E) plus gravel taupe (#7D7264) plus flag gold (#FFC72C, reserved for place/Polaris/correction). NOT graphite-night+phantom-blue (8), NOT thermal ember/amber (9), NOT blueprint+cyan+salmon+parchment (10).
entries.type_pairing: Archivo (variable width axis) display plus Manrope body plus JetBrains Mono instrument. NOT Instrument Serif+Space Grotesk+JBMono (9), NOT Fraunces+Space Grotesk+JBMono (10). Both warm serifs deliberately avoided (exhausted by Nos 9-10).
entries.narrative_structure: HOOK (globe/place-paradox) -> pay (physical fact) -> stakes (hedged) -> hero/breather (buried cable) -> point (the twin, narrow ML) -> keepable data (spec plate) -> synthesis (the correcting loop, thesis) -> honesty (one tick plus two evidence tags) -> close (globe returns, single ask).
new_techniques_logged: Source-Provenance Evidence Tags (SOURCED vs NOT CHECKED honesty beat)
entries.notes: Honesty-as-design: the S8 two-evidence-tags beat (gold VERIFIED/SOURCED press release vs dashed-gray NOT CHECKED paywalled paper) plus one-gold-tick-on-a-vast-empty-plain scale. Scorer 8.81 praised story-art fusion and the first true rendered PBR hero of the series. Watch-item: dead lower zones on S5/S8/S9 held artwork-craft at 8.

entries.hero_structure: Gradebook-page editorial substrate + an evolving pencil motif, with a rendered akthree GPU PBR pencil-on-lit-gradebook still-life as the one depth hero (S5); every other slide argues flat editorial deliberately. NOT arctic-place+buried-cable (11), iso-wiring (10), thermal-search-grid (9), or uncomputed-relief survey-plate (8).
entries.atmosphere: gradebook at night: dark chalkboard-slate base with a warm desk-lamp raking light and paper tooth; lit cream paper at the hero and the keepable card. NOT polar-permafrost-ochre (11), blueprint-night-iso (10), thermal ember/amber (9).
entries.depth_technique: akthree GPU PBR pencil still-life (S5, warm key + objectHero rim + colored contact shadow + akpost dawn grade + designed Canvas-2D fallback with .ok sentinel); cabinet-extruded vetting gate (S4); the rest flat/parallel editorial (argued in each dossier).
entries.line_voice: instrument/editorial + drafting (ruled gradebook lines, red margin rule, scotch rule) + hand-adjacent pencil marks
entries.continuity_device: motif-evolution (a gradebook page written in pencil; the pencil changes SHAPE every slide and its length encodes the shrinking runway to the fall deadline: poised -> writing -> nib pressing a strained line -> drawing a boundary -> rendered hero -> at-rest on a card -> eraser-up -> worn stub -> stub set down with a gold seal) + palette-arc (cold slate -> lit-paper peak -> gold-sealed close) + edge-tease. NOT cable-spine+globe-bookends (11), NOT iso-conduit (10).
entries.hook_archetype: before-after / named-tension ('AI is already in class. The rulebook is still in pencil.'). NOT place-paradox (11), direct-question (10), scene/stakes (9).
entries.palette_family: chalkboard-slate #0C1512/#12201B/#182A22 + lit paper #E7DDC8/#F2EADA + chalk #E9EEE9 + graphite #6E7A72 + cedar #7A6144 + grading-red #D9524A + flag gold #FFC72C (Polaris, one Alaska ISOTYPE mark, brass ferrule, close seal). NOT polar-navy+cyan+ochre (11), blueprint+cyan+salmon+parchment (10), thermal ember/amber (9).
entries.type_pairing: Bricolage Grotesque (display 700-800) + Instrument Serif (serif + italic quotes/asks) + JetBrains Mono (numerals/labels/counter); one display OR serif + mono per slide. NOT Archivo+Manrope+JBMono (11), NOT Fraunces+SpaceGrotesk+JBMono (10); matches No.6 trio (7 decks back).
entries.narrative_structure: argument / coined-frame: hook -> receipt ($ spent before rules) -> the two questions (frame) -> the data guardrail -> write it in pencil (rendered breather) -> the state playbook (keepable card) -> the board debate -> the deadline -> single debate ask.
new_techniques_logged: Gradebook-page motif + evolving pencil (NEW): a ruled gradebook/ledger page as the shared editorial substrate carried by ONE pencil that changes STATE every slide and whose LENGTH encodes a shrinking deadline runway (full at the hero, worn stub near the deadline), plus one rendered object hero of the same pencil; carries a text/policy story with 8 flat editorial slides and one climbed rung of the rendered ladder. Generalizes to any rulemaking, policy, drafting, or education story.
entries.notes: Scored 8.55 vs 8.3, zero hard fails, vector PDF 2.2MB. Weakest = artwork craft (7): 8 of 9 slides flat editorial (deliberately argued) carried by one rendered pencil hero that still reads slightly like a gold rod without a fully distinct graphite writing tip. Story-art fusion 8. Net-new topic (AI in K-12 education, never covered in 11 prior decks). Low-contrast accent furniture (gold counter on paper, red-on-cream) darkened before ship. Flow-critic SHIP 8.3 sequence-reads-as-one.

entries.hero_structure: Continuous underwater Cook Inlet depth-world (camera descends the water column) with a crafted stylized illustrated beluga hero (S3), a crafted 3D steel hydrophone (S4), and a SINGLE warm gold 'call' motif that changes STATE but NEVER multiplies. NOT thermal search-grid over AK3D valley (9), iso wiring-diagram (10), globe bookends + buried cable (11), or gradebook-page + pencil (12).
entries.atmosphere: abyssal Cook Inlet water column: steel-teal murk, volumetric surface shafts, marine snow, a glacial-silt ship-noise band. NOT blueprint-night iso (10), polar-night permafrost-ochre (11), gradebook-at-night (12).
entries.depth_technique: multiplane parallax water column + volumetric surface shafts + DOF foreground particulate + a crafted 3D hydrophone (cabinet extrusion + rim light, S4); the S3 beluga hero is a shaded 2D illustration argued deliberate (akthree GPU path attempted but the transparent-subject black-frame snapshot sentinel false-negatived, forcing the designed Canvas fallback). Honest parallel-linear projection on the S7 chart.
entries.line_voice: instrument/editorial + transit/systems (ring gates, classify fork + human loop, boundary box, leaders, drafting furniture)
entries.continuity_device: camera-descent (mono depth readout as progress meter) + motif:single-gold-call-that-never-multiplies (seals into the Polaris at close) + ship-noise-band edge-tease. NOT cable/signal spine (11), NOT gradebook+pencil (12).
entries.hook_archetype: sensory/number cold-open (a single faint gold call deep in dark water + the '331 LEFT' stat). NOT direct-question (10), place-paradox (11), before-after/named-tension (12).
entries.palette_family: abyssal-teal + glacial-silt + beluga-pearl + call-gold (deep_night #02060F / water #06202B/#0A2A38/#0E2A3A, silt #47575B, pearl #EAF2F0, snow #F4F8FF, gold #FFC72C RESERVED for the call / the S7 331 datapoint / the Polaris). NOT blueprint+cyan+salmon+parchment (10), polar-navy+cyan+ochre (11), chalkboard-slate+lit-paper (12).
entries.type_pairing: Space Grotesk (display + body/labels) + JetBrains Mono (instrument). Pure cool, no serif. NOT Archivo+Manrope+JBMono (11), NOT Bricolage+Instrument Serif+JBMono (12).
entries.narrative_structure: argument / honesty-as-edge: sensory hook -> the machine (detect+classify) -> the stakes (beluga hero, down ~80%) -> the noise problem -> how it works (+ human loop) -> satellite breather (the one altitude flip) -> keepable honest chart (1,300->279->331 hedged) -> the boundary/limit (measures but cannot move) -> single ask.
new_techniques_logged: Single-call-that-never-multiplies motif: ONE warm signal-point that changes STATE across the whole deck (cover faint call -> detect-ring center -> descending needle -> beluga classify node -> chart 331 datapoint -> Polaris seal) but is NEVER duplicated, so 'a clearer signal is not more whales'; the restraint IS the honesty argument. Pairs with a visibly UNCHANGED environment S1 vs S8.

Boundary-box limit beat: the instrument drawn inside a dashed frame; the untouched threats (noise/prey/habitat) drawn as arrows that STOP at the wall with a red blocked-cap and no intake port = 'the machine measures the whale, it cannot move it'. Generalizes to any better-instrument-not-a-fix story.
entries.notes: Scored 8.77 vs 8.3. Story-art fusion 9 (the never-multiplying call + the unchanged water + the honest chart + the boundary box). Variety 9. Weakest = artwork craft 7: the S3 beluga shipped as the Canvas fallback and reads flat/cartoonish (akthree transparent-subject snapshot false-negative); dead lower thirds on S3/S5/S8. Flow-critic SHIP, sequence_reads_as_one true, motif_reads_across_all_9 true.
